# ARM NEON Quick Reference

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_arm_intrinsics_manual.py. Do not edit manually. -->

面向固定 128-bit 向量化循环的 NEON quick reference，聚焦主向量循环、广播、加法、FMA、sum/dot reduction 和显式尾处理。

## Headers and Feature Gates

| Header | Feature Gate | Typical Use |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <arm_neon.h> | `__ARM_NEON` | 逐元素加法 |

## Standard Vector Loop Pattern

```c
#include <arm_neon.h>

void add_arrays_f32(const float *a, const float *b, float *out, int n) {
    int i = 0;
    for (; i + 4 <= n; i += 4) {
        float32x4_t va = vld1q_f32(a + i);
        float32x4_t vb = vld1q_f32(b + i);
        float32x4_t vc = vaddq_f32(va, vb);
        vst1q_f32(out + i, vc);
    }
    for (; i < n; ++i) {
        out[i] = a[i] + b[i];
    }
}
```

## Load / Store Patterns

| Intrinsic | Maps To | Use For | Key Constraint |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `vld1q_f32` | `LD1` | 连续读取向量主体 | Use only for fixed-width 128-bit NEON loops with unit-stride access. |
| `vst1q_f32` | `ST1` | 写回向量主体 | Store the same lane width that the NEON main loop computes. |

## Arithmetic and Broadcast

| Intrinsic | Maps To | Use For | Key Constraint |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `vdupq_n_f32` | `DUP` | 广播标量到向量 | Use when one scalar is intentionally replicated across all NEON lanes. |
| `vaddq_f32` | `FADD`, `ADD` | 逐元素加法 | Use the same element type for both operands and the destination vector. |
| `vfmaq_f32` | `FMLA` | 乘加或累加内核 | Choose vfmaq_f32 only when the scalar algorithm already performs an accumulate += lhs * rhs. |

## Reduction Helpers

| Intrinsic | Maps To | Use For | Key Constraint |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `vaddvq_f32` | `FADDP` | sum/dot 最终水平归约 | Use only for final horizontal reduction of a vector accumulator. |
| `vaddvq_s32` | `ADDV` | sum/dot 最终水平归约 | Use only when int32 overflow behavior is either irrelevant or explicitly acceptable. |

## Common Pitfalls

- `NEON loops must keep an explicit scalar epilogue`: Ending the kernel after the NEON loop with no scalar cleanup.
- `Do not mix NEON, SVE and SME templates in one kernel body`: Calling vld1q_f32 and svld1_f32 in the same loop body.

## Quick Lookup

### `vld1q_f32`

- `Maps To`: `LD1`
- `Prototype`: `float32x4_t vld1q_f32(float32_t const *ptr)`
- `Header`: `<arm_neon.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_NEON`
- `Use When`: 连续读取向量主体
- `Key Rule`: Use only for fixed-width 128-bit NEON loops with unit-stride access.
- `Common Mistake`: Using vld1q_f32 inside a loop that still increments by 1 element.
- `Example`:
```c
float32x4_t va = vld1q_f32(a + i);
```

- `Source`: [Arm Neon Intrinsics Reference](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/neon_intrinsics/advsimd.html) / Vector arithmetic / load-store intrinsics / 2026-05-12

### `vst1q_f32`

- `Maps To`: `ST1`
- `Prototype`: `void vst1q_f32(float32_t *ptr, float32x4_t val)`
- `Header`: `<arm_neon.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_NEON`
- `Use When`: 写回向量主体
- `Key Rule`: Store the same lane width that the NEON main loop computes.
- `Common Mistake`: Using vst1q_f32 when the destination overlaps with a later scalar tail in an unsafe way.
- `Example`:
```c
vst1q_f32(out + i, vc);
```

- `Source`: [Arm Neon Intrinsics Reference](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/neon_intrinsics/advsimd.html) / Vector arithmetic / load-store intrinsics / 2026-05-12

### `vdupq_n_f32`

- `Maps To`: `DUP`
- `Prototype`: `float32x4_t vdupq_n_f32(float32_t value)`
- `Header`: `<arm_neon.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_NEON`
- `Use When`: 广播标量到向量
- `Key Rule`: Use when one scalar is intentionally replicated across all NEON lanes.
- `Common Mistake`: Rebuilding the same broadcast value on every iteration without need.
- `Example`:
```c
float32x4_t alpha_vec = vdupq_n_f32(alpha);
```

- `Source`: [Arm Neon Intrinsics Reference](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/neon_intrinsics/advsimd.html) / Move / duplicate intrinsics / 2026-05-12

### `vaddq_f32`

- `Maps To`: `FADD`, `ADD`
- `Prototype`: `float32x4_t vaddq_f32(float32x4_t a, float32x4_t b)`
- `Header`: `<arm_neon.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_NEON`
- `Use When`: 逐元素加法
- `Key Rule`: Use the same element type for both operands and the destination vector.
- `Common Mistake`: Mixing integer and floating-point NEON types in the same add without an explicit conversion.
- `Example`:
```c
float32x4_t vc = vaddq_f32(va, vb);
```

- `Source`: [Arm Neon Intrinsics Reference](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/neon_intrinsics/advsimd.html) / Vector arithmetic / Addition / 2026-05-12

### `vfmaq_f32`

- `Maps To`: `FMLA`
- `Prototype`: `float32x4_t vfmaq_f32(float32x4_t acc, float32x4_t lhs, float32x4_t rhs)`
- `Header`: `<arm_neon.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_NEON`
- `Use When`: 乘加或累加内核
- `Key Rule`: Choose vfmaq_f32 only when the scalar algorithm already performs an accumulate += lhs * rhs.
- `Common Mistake`: Replacing a plain add with vfmaq_f32 without a multiply operand.
- `Example`:
```c
vacc = vfmaq_f32(vacc, vlhs, vrhs);
```

- `Source`: [Arm Neon Intrinsics Reference](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/neon_intrinsics/advsimd.html) / Vector arithmetic / Fused multiply-add / 2026-05-12

### `vaddvq_f32`

- `Maps To`: `FADDP`
- `Prototype`: `float32_t vaddvq_f32(float32x4_t a)`
- `Header`: `<arm_neon.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_NEON`
- `Use When`: sum/dot 最终水平归约
- `Key Rule`: Use only for final horizontal reduction of a vector accumulator.
- `Common Mistake`: Using vaddvq_f32 for prefix-sum or per-element scan output.
- `Example`:
```c
float acc = vaddvq_f32(vacc);
```

- `Source`: [Arm Neon Intrinsics Reference](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/neon_intrinsics/advsimd.html) / Vector arithmetic / Across vector arithmetic / 2026-05-12

### `vaddvq_s32`

- `Maps To`: `ADDV`
- `Prototype`: `int32_t vaddvq_s32(int32x4_t a)`
- `Header`: `<arm_neon.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_NEON`
- `Use When`: sum/dot 最终水平归约
- `Key Rule`: Use only when int32 overflow behavior is either irrelevant or explicitly acceptable.
- `Common Mistake`: Using vaddvq_s32 when the original scalar contract depends on trapping or undefined overflow details.
- `Example`:
```c
int32_t acc = vaddvq_s32(vacc);
```

- `Source`: [Arm Neon Intrinsics Reference](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/neon_intrinsics/advsimd.html) / Vector arithmetic / Across vector arithmetic / 2026-05-12
